news.title: WashU Expert: Scaling up the circular economy
news.summary_en: Engineers at Washington University are addressing the challenges to scaling up CO2 electrolysis.

news.title: Synthetic biology leads to recyclable textiles: Engineered protein fibers for a cleaner future
news.summary_en: Researchers develop engineered protein polymers that can be easily recycled and reused.

news.title: Mixed plastic waste target of upcycling process to cut waste, emissions
